Nature's Farm来自南极的磷虾油，富含优质Omega-3脂肪酸和虾红素, 有助于维持胆固醇水平、维护心 脏、大脑和关节健康！ 人体对磷虾油的吸收率更高，没有难闻的鱼腥味，软胶囊更容易吞服，一天2颗有助于维护整体健康！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Mobot AURA X 4-Wheel Mobility Scooter
programme.desc: One click folds or unfolds the AURA X. Lightweight, portable, and airline-approved, it’s safe, stylish, and travel-ready. iF Design Award 2024 winner—effortless mobility anytime, anywhere. 一按遥控器即可折叠或展开,轻巧便携，折叠后像行李箱一样拖行，配备安全认证电池, 可带上飞机。获iF设计大奖 2024，让日常出行和旅行轻松自在。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Furi Knife Bundle Set
programme.desc: Slice, dice, and chop like a pro with our kitchen knives! 厨房刀片如同专业大厨一般娴熟！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kinohimitsu Collagen Diamond Pro
programme.desc: Kinohimitsu’s newly upgraded Collagen Diamond Pro combines 5,500mg of marine collagen peptides with NMN, Resveratrol, and Astaxanthin to rejuvenate your skin from within. It helps reduce fine lines and wrinkles, evens out dullness and pigmentation, and boosts elasticity and hydration—leaving skin firmer, smoother, and radiant. Kinohimitsu全新升级的 Collagen Diamond Pro 胶原蛋白饮，融合5500毫克深海胶原胜肽与NMN、白藜芦醇及虾红素，从内而外激活年轻能量。有效淡化细纹皱纹，改善暗沉与色斑，全面提升肌肤弹性与保湿力，让肌肤更紧致、水润、透亮。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - i-Running TM-299 Foldable Treadmill
programme.desc: Compact, slim, and ready to use straight out of the box. Walk or jog anytime with quiet operation, shock absorption for joint comfort, and adjustable speed and incline. Fold it flat for easy storage—your convenient home fitness solution. 轻巧省空间，开箱即用。安静运行、减震护膝，可调速度与坡度，适合快走与慢跑。折叠后薄至12公分，轻松收纳床底或靠墙摆放，让居家运动更轻松自在。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Naturalle Sugar Care Tea
programme.desc: Crafted from 100% natural leaves including gymnema, mulberry and green tea, the Naturalle Sugar Care tea is mild-flavoured and low in calories. A perfect post-meal beverage, this tea may help curb sugar cravings and support healthy post-meal blood sugar levels, making it great for individuals who frequently consume carbohydrate-rich or sugary foods. Naturalle 糖适宁茶采用 100% 天然叶材精制而成，包括匙羹藤、桑叶与绿茶，口感清淡、低热量。糖适宁茶是适合餐后饮用，有助于抑制对甜食的渴望和维持血糖健康水平，非常适合经常摄取高碳水或含糖食物的人士饮用

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HQ Ling Zhi
programme.desc: HQ Lingzhi Cracked Spores Powder is formulated and manufactured in Singapore. It enhances the body’s immune system, reduces fatigue, promotes blood circulation, protects the liver, and improves metabolism. HQ 灵芝破壁孢子粉由新加坡配制和生产。它能够增强身体的免疫系统，减少疲劳，促进血液循环，保护肝脏，并改善新陈代谢。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - EBENE’s Bio-Ray Knee Guard with Tourmaline
programme.desc: The knee guard provides firm support and gentle compression around the kneecap to stabilize joints and reduce strain. Infused with Bio-Ray technology and tourmaline warmth, it promotes circulation, eases stiffness, and delivers lasting comfort. Lightweight and breathable, it keeps knees supported, protected, and ready for all-day wear. 护膝提供膝盖周围稳固支撑与轻柔加压，分担关节压力，减少磨损。结合日本生化能技术与托玛琳微热作用，促进血气循环、舒缓僵硬, 让膝盖在日常走动、运动中都保持稳定与健康， 降低磨损和退化风险。 透气材质，天天戴都舒适。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Wiltshire Pink Board Bundle
programme.desc: All-in-one knife, scissors and board bundle that makes your life easier with an in-built knife sharpener! 全套组合菜刀、剪刀、砧板，让你下厨更轻松！菜刀和剪刀附专业磨刀套！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Q’SAI Knee Supporter Collagen
programme.desc: QSAI Knee Supporter Collagen, cumulative sales exceed 50 million pieces as of Jan 2024, delivers highly absorbable collagen peptides, Hyaluronic Acid, and Chondroitin to nourish joints and cartilage, relieve joint pain. Its tasteless, odorless powder blends effortlessly into any food or drink, making it perfect for daily joint care, especially for those who prefer not to take pills. Q’SAI 膝之助胶原蛋白粉 QSAI 护膝胶原蛋白粉，截至2024年1月累计销量已超过5000万盒，富含高吸收性的胶原蛋白肽、玻尿酸和软骨素，有助滋养关节和软骨、缓解关节疼痛。其无味无臭的粉末状配方，可轻松加入任何食物或饮料中服用，是日常关节护理的理想之选，尤其适合那些不想服用药片的人士。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ellixi Hair Tonic
programme.desc: Revitalize your hair with Ellixi Hair Tonic — your ultimate solution for stronger, healthier, and more vibrant locks. Infused with a powerful blend of natural botanical extracts, essential oils, and vital nutrients, Ellixi helps to promote growth, and helps reduce hair fall. Whether you're battling thinning, dryness, or dullness, this lightweight tonic nourishes the scalp and restores shine without leaving any residue. 护发要趁早！Ellixi打造更健康、更亮丽秀发。Ellixi 纯天然植物萃取、含精油和有助于护发的重要营养素，有助于促进头发生长，减少脱发。无论您是头发稀疏、干燥问题，或是希望保持浓密秀发，Ellixi都能帮助你滋养头皮，恢复秀发光泽，且不留任何残留。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set
programme.desc: The Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set makes meal prep and long-term storage easy, locking in freshness and flavour. Tupperware's No. 1 freezing containers feature a speedy-freeze design and flexible material for easy unmolding. Available in multiple sizes, there's a perfect container for every freezer storage need. Tupperware 冷冻保鲜 5 件套让备餐和长期储存变得便捷，有效锁住食物的新鲜度。作为 Tupperware 畅销第一的冷冻容器，它采用快速冷冻设计与柔韧材质，冷冻后轻松脱模。多种尺寸组合，能轻松满足各种冷冻储存的需求。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OTO ePhysio
programme.desc: An upgraded foot reflexology device that helps relieve aches, swelling, and numbness while improving blood circulation. Made in Korea, it uses low-frequency wave technology to gently stimulate muscle movement and support better blood flow. With dual channels for body pads and waist belt, it allows full-body use—helping reduce fatigue, improve circulation, and support overall wellness. OTO e-Physio 电波保健仪，升级版足部理疗设备，有助缓解酸痛、肿胀与麻木，同时促进血液循环。韩国制造，采用低频电波刺激肌肉，帮助带动血流。配备双通道设计，可连接贴片与腰带，实现全身使用，帮助减轻疲劳、改善循环，提升整体健康状态。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - ASD Hybrid 3-ply Hex Wok 32 & 36cm
programme.desc: This cookware is made with strong stainless steel and a long-lasting non-stick coating from Whitford (USA). Its 7-layer design ensures even heat distribution and helps keep heat longer, providing great cooking results every time. Perfect for those looking for high-quality, easy-to-use kitchen tools. ASD爱仕达316不锈钢不粘炒锅采用三层钢结构与耐高温不粘涂层，结合了不锈钢的耐用与不粘锅的便捷。蜂窝纹理设计省油防粘，食材加热均匀，不怕铁铲和钢丝球刮擦，适合烹饪各种坚硬食材。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HOTO Electric Spin Scrubber
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly. 一款无线高扭矩清洁器，为轻松，深层清洁而设计。它可伸缩手柄与6种可替换刷头，轻松清洁地板，瓷砖，浴缸及狭小角落。简约奢华设计，适合每个人使用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Thomson Probiotic
programme.desc: Thomson ProbioGut is a premium probiotic supplement designed to support digestive health, boost immunity, and promote overall well-being. Formulated with two clinically researched Japanese probiotic strains—it helps improve gut flora, regulate bowel movements, and maintain a healthy body weight. Thomson ProbioGut 是一款优质的益生菌补充剂，专为支持消化健康、增强免疫力和促进整体健康而设计。采用两种临床研究认证的日本益生菌菌株— 有助于改善肠道菌群、调节排便，并维持健康的体重

programme.title: The Treasure of Jamaica Reef
programme.desc: A suspense filled adventure-drama about the search for a treasure-laden Spanish Galleon that sank over 200 years ago.

programme.title: Dirty Heroes
programme.desc: After three American soldiers escape from a German prison, they go to the resistance headquarters where they are assigned a dangerous mission of stealing the documents from the Wehrmacht.

programme.title: The Hellbenders
programme.desc: After the civil war, a hell-bent Confederate Army Officer and his sons rob a Union Caravan carrying a fortune, killing every man and beast in the process. They hide the money in an empty coffin and hire a woman to pose as a widow to a dead officer to make it look official. Now they must con and fight their way across the west through thousands of cavalry, lawmen, bounty hunters, and Indians to make their escape.

programme.desc: We focus on the partnership between Alfa Romeo and Sauber.

programme.title: Only Live Once - BMX Supercross - EP24
programme.desc: This episode starts with the BMX supercross. The series heads to Holland where the immense track of Papendal hosts some furious action.

programme.title: The Truth About - Kaepernick Vs Armstrong - EP24
programme.desc: Colin Kaepernick risked his career for a political protest. Lance Armstrong built his career on a lie.

programme.title: Chill - Nescafé Champs - EP18
programme.desc: Chlll joins some of the best free skiers on some of the most difficult terrains of the planet. And in Leysin, it's the five star snowboard event, the legendary Nescafe Champs.

programme.title: Fight Stars - Deontay Wilder - EP14
programme.desc: In Fight Stars, meet the greatest stars of combat sports, notably US heavyweight Deontay Wilder. Also, we tell you which fighters have tried their hands at reality TV and look back at the career of the Golden Boy of boxing.

programme.title: Invincible - Joe Louis - EP33
programme.desc: When the world needed a hero, the Brown Bomber rose up and did what he had to do.

programme.title: Fight Stars - Nicola Adams - EP6

programme.title: Flashpoint - Michael Jordan/ Agnes Keliti/ India 1983 - EP14
programme.desc: Michael Jordan danced for the last time for the Chicago Bulls in 1998. Agnes Keleti dominated the Melbourne Olympic Games in 1956. And India stunned the world by carrying off the cricketing World Cup in 1983.

programme.title: Invincible - Kobe Bryant - EP50
programme.desc: One of the greatest basketball players in the history of the NBA, Kobe Bryant, was also one of the most competitive.

programme.title: Flashpoint - Black Power Salute - EP1
programme.desc: Tommie Smith and John Carlos make their famous protest at the 1968 Olympic Games, Gareth Bale scores the greatest Champions League final goal and Kawhi Leonard's buzzer-beater is suspended on the edge of the screen.

programme.title: GOAT - The Greatest Of All Time - F1 Drivers - EP20
programme.desc: Who is the greatest Formula 1 driver of all time?

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep4 - EP104
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Operation: Himari - EP106
programme.desc: Himari has an accident on the road and has to get repairs.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep7 - EP107
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep8 - EP8
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Courage - EP111
programme.desc: In this episode, we will explore the corners of outer space where only the brave ones can reach. Curious will teach us that being brave doesn't mean being afraid, but acting in spite of fear. We will discover that courage is inside each one of us and that "determination" allows us to face our fears, while "will" pushes us to do things with passion.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Humility - EP112
programme.desc: In this episode, we will learn the importance of humility. We will understand how to have good sportsmanship and respect the efforts of your opponent. We will learn that with humility we can put aside arrogance and anger. We will also discover that there is no problem in asking for help from others because in doing so, that is also an act of humility.

programme.title: Mellodees - Hickory Dickory Dock - EP12
programme.desc: Mini Dee explores the inner workings of a clock in this magical adventure.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep5 - EP105
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.title: Giselle and the Green Team - The Case of the Acid Rain - EP111
programme.desc: Gisele and the Green Team stop Nick Slick from burning sulfur coal and polluting the environment.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Ground Control to Biggie D - EP107
programme.desc: Biggie D goes on an unexpected trip into space.

programme.desc: When a power company worker finds an abandoned eagle’s nest precariously perched atop a wind turbine the SECRET LAB KIDS build a homemade rocket to fire a rope up to him so he can lower the nest to safety. / When JD and Kent discover there’s a shortage of beeswax for their surfboards, it leads to the discovery that all the local honeybees have vanished from the beehives.

programme.title: Mellodees - Itsy Bitsy Spider - EP3
programme.desc: With a rainstorm approaching, Dee has playtime in his room and makes a new little friend.

programme.title: Argo's World

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie’s play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood; trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.desc: Gods Gang

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - God's Gang | What's Cooking | Episode 4
programme.desc: Gods Gang

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - Gods Gang | Mystery Ally in the Flames | Episode 5
programme.desc: A forest trip turns into chaos when wildfire strikes! With no tech, the gang must unite to survive. Just when hope fades, a glowing hero appears. Who is it?

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - Gods Gang | Trials of KungFuda | Episode 6
programme.desc: A forest in flames. A rising fear. Enter Kungfuda, the mystery kicker who pushes God’s Gang to unlock their true power. Can the gang overcome fear and awaken as true Forest Guardians before darkness consumes it all?

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Ethan The Dumptruck helps Edgar move some sand.
programme.desc: Edgar needs help moving some mounds of sand! Troy selects the highest-capacity truck he knows: Ethan the Dumptruck!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Amber the Ambulance takes Katy to the hospital
programme.desc: Katy needs help; she's feeling sick! Troy selects the most helpful, kindest car he knows: Amber the Ambulance!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Ben the Tractor daves the day.
programme.desc: Oh no, there's bales of hay all over the highway! Troy selects the most helpful truck he knows: Ben the Tractor!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Hector the Helicopter rescues Suzy
programme.desc: Suzy had an accident and needs urgent help! Troy selects the most perfect vehicle to help rescue her: Hector the Helicopter!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Sam the Snowplough clears the streets
programme.desc: Lilly and Tom are stuck in the snow! Troy selects the most perfect truck for the job: Sam the Snowplough!

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - OCTO-DANCE! ROOKIE AND THE OCTOPUS
programme.desc: Rookie is sitting on the shore, enjoying the sun, when he sees something repeatedly poking out of the water, sparking his curiosity. He puts on his underwater robot mask and dives into the ocean. At first, all he finds are rocks and coral, but suddenly, big, round eyes are staring at him from a gray rock. He flees in panic, but when he realizes that it is an octopus whose tentacles are tangled in plastic waste, he quickly frees his new friend from this unpleasant situation, and they dance happily together in the water

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - GAME ON? ROOKIE AND THE COMPUTER
programme.desc: Rookie comes across an office cubicle with a computer on the table and is immediately fascinated. He presses some keys, a little character appears on the screen, and a computer game starts. Very excited, Rookie continues to press different keys. When in the end he wins the race and earns a trophy, the computer suddenly takes Rookie‘s photo and prints it out. However, the printing doesn‘t stop, and soon the whole floor is covered with photos before Rookie finally manages to shut down the computer and stop the madness.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - LET IT BEEEEE! ROOKIE AND THE BEE
programme.desc: Rookie finds a wooden box, knocks on it, and then shakes it. What a bad idea! The whole swarm of bees chases him, and he has to hide in the bushes. After the swarm is gone, he finds a tired and exhausted bee on the ground. Rookie has the idea to rescue the little bee with a sugar cube. The whole beehive is grateful, and Rookie learns a lot about the work of these useful little friends.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - SNOWBALL EFFECT? ROOKIE AND THE POLAR BEAR
programme.desc: Rookie is happily stomping through the snow when he suddenly gets hit by several snowballs. A pair of cheeky polar bears try to engage him in a playful snowball fight. But Rookie outwits them by hiding in the snow, causing the bears to stumble and then get hit by his surprise robot snowball machine. After the snowy confusion turns to laughter, everyone shares a moment of fun and happiness.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - SPRING, SUMMER, FALL & WINTER - ROOKIE AND THE 4 SEASONS
programme.desc: From the window of his house Rookie watches the four seasons pass by and thinks of his friends and the great fun and adventures they had throughout the year: The bees that make everything bloom and the cheeky little ladybug in spring; a day at the beach, snorkeling with friends and a water battle in summer; fl ying kites, fun in the rain and his friend the squirrel getting ready in autumn and building snowmen, snowballs and sledding fun in winter.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - READY, SET, GO! ROOKIE AND THE RABBIT
programme.desc: Rookie is relaxing in the sun when something rushes past him, leaving him in a cloud of dust. Using his telescope, he spots a racing rabbit, and with the tasty prospect of a sweet carrot for the winner, he manages to persuade it to take part in a race. Ready – steady – and off they go: Even though the rabbit stumbles and Rookie has to help, they finish the race together, tumbling happily over the finish line.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - BALANCE IN PINK – ROOKIE AND THE FLAMINGO
programme.desc: On his stroll around a lake, Rookie spots a group of pink flamingos gracefully balancing on one leg. Curious, Rookie tries to imitate them and, after practicing a little, manages to do so quite well. But suddenly there‘s a loud splash and Rookie discovers a flamingo struggling to stand on one leg, falling over and over. Offering to help, Rookie comes up with an excellent idea - a pair of roller skates! And there, slowly but surely, the flamingo learns to skate gracefully like a ballerina and to balance on one leg as well.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - BOUNCE, REBOUND - SCORE! ROOKIE AND THE GIRAFFE
programme.desc: Rookie is out for a walk on a beautiful day when he suddenly hears a rhythmic sound in the distance. Curious as always, he goes out to investigate and finds a young giraffe playing basketball, skillfully dribbling and bouncing the ball into a basketball hoop high in the trees. Of course, Rookie wants to join in, but he has a few things to learn before their first game. In the end, they impress each other with their skills and tricks.

programme.title: LMN's - LMN's - Las tierras raras
programme.desc: LMN's

programme.title: LMN's - LMN's - El desierto
programme.desc: En medio de un desierto abrasador, Chip y los átomos se encontraron con un átomo de tungsteno que les brindó refugio bajo un edificio piramidal que, hasta hacía poco, contaba con un ingenioso sistema de refrigeración por el que circulaba una corriente de amoníaco en su sótano. Pero ahora, el Dr. No ha desviado el flujo de amoníaco para su propio beneficio. Chip descubre el punto donde se desvía el amoníaco y construye una presa que lo devuelve a su curso normal.

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock’ Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it’s not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.

programme.title: The Chase S16 - EP 24

programme.title: The Ultimatum - EP 13 双子星

Both Wen Yu and Song Nian's wife gave birth to daughters in the same hospital. As fate will have it, the hospital made a mistake and swapped the babies. Because Wen Yu's daughter was diagnosed with congenital heart disease, she kept silent about the mistake so that her daughter can receive the best medical care with Song Nian's wealth.

programme.desc: Hilda is surprised that Rahimah comes to Syarifs home. Hilda makes a drastic decision. Syurga becomes closer to Farah, making Rahimah worried. Seri feels threated with Shikins presence and vie for the promotion. Hilmi is embarrassed that Rahimah knows his problems.

programme.title: Syurga Ibu - EP 4
programme.desc: Hilmi panics when he cannot contact Hilda and Syarif. Hilmi, Hilda and Syurga blame each other for what happened in their family. Seri instigates Hilmi that Syurga is beyond control. Syarif and Hildas relationship is strained when she has too much on her mind.

programme.title: Syurga Ibu - EP 5
programme.desc: Seri is getting impatient with Hilmi and appears at Syarifs doorstep. Seri thinks of a way so that Shikin doesnt get more attention from Farid. Johan sees Syurga and reprimands her without finding out what happened. Hilmi is torn between his wife and his sisters.

programme.title: Syurga Ibu - EP 6
programme.desc: Seri forces Syurga to exchange rooms with her. Syurga cannot believe that Hilmi keeps mum. She confides in Farah who advises her not to pay attention to her family. Hilda becomes more distant and suspicious of Syarif. Syarif tries to find out about Hilda from Hilmi.

programme.title: Syurga Ibu - EP 7
programme.desc: Hilda is suspicious when Syarif goes outstation for his work. Hilmi is worried about Zaim as he becomes busier working and Seri wants to return to work earlier. Rizqi tries to win Syurgas heart and wants her to know his feelings.

OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kinohimitsu Wellsure
programme.desc: A plant-based protein nutritional drink that ensures a balanced intake of nutrients, promoting visible improvements in muscle health, immune resilience, eye health, and digestion. 一种植物性蛋白全营养饮，确保摄取均衡营养，有助于显著改善肌肉健康、增强免疫力、促进眼部健康和消化功能

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OTO Anyway Back Massage Cushion
programme.desc: A lightweight 4.5 kg cushion that turns any seat into a personal massage chair. Dual rollers on a full-length track relax from neck to hips and improve circulation. Simple controls make instant relaxation easy anytime, anywhere. 仅重 4.5 公斤，轻巧便携，椅子、沙发或车里都能用，一靠即可全背按摩。双滚轮从颈肩到腰臀，舒缓肌肉、促进循环。靠垫柔软贴合、支撑力佳、透气舒适，随时轻松放松。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Clean V2 Cordless Vacuum Cleaner
programme.desc: Transform the way you clean with the Acerpure Clean V2 cordless vacuum, designed for modern living. Its ultra-strong suction power and multi-stage filtration system capture even the finest dust in your homes. Lightweight yet powerful, it makes cleaning quick and comfortable with its ergonomic design and long-lasting battery. Acerpure V2 无线吸尘机， 四种刷头，满足全屋清洁需求。 1.37公斤超轻无线主机，轻盈好超控。三档模式，20000pa强劲气旋吸力，灰尘一扫而空。多角度掌控自如，让您更顺畅地左右移动，滑行或转向。轻巧却强劲有力，是您最佳的清洁伙伴。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Kyocera Ceramic Knife
programme.desc: Ultra-sharp, lightweight, and rust-proof—preserve food’s natural color and nutrients. Effortlessly cut fruits, vegetables, and boneless meat. Reinforced black blades stay sharp 10× longer than steel. Smooth surfaces make cleaning quick and easy, delivering precise, effortless cutting every time 体验日本匠心工艺——锋利轻巧、不生锈，保留食材原色和营养。轻松切水果、蔬菜和无骨肉类。强化黑刃版比钢刀锋利10倍更持久，光滑表面易清洗，精准切割，高效省力。

programme.desc: Sergio Aguero wins the title of champion of France and Aaron beats Babe's record.

programme.title: Football Stars - Captain Chiellini - EP4
programme.desc: Captain Chiellini, as tough as they come.

programme.title: Foul Play - Skategate - EP3
programme.desc: The scandal of the figure skating judges at the Salt Lake City Winter Olympics.

programme.title: The Evolution of Sport - Workloads and Lone Wolves - EP4
programme.desc: From the chaotic rules of football to the management of the workload of the NBA and the solitary work of solo sports, endurance and programmes without end shape modern competitions like few other things.

programme.title: The Short List - Top 10 NBA Characters - EP10
programme.desc: The countdown of the 10 best personalities of the NBA.

programme.title: Top 10 - NBA Fashion Influencers - EP162
programme.desc: The Top is an exclusive ranking of the news or the champions who are causing a buzz on planet sport!

programme.title: The Immortals - Jose Mourinho - EP31
programme.desc: In this episode of The Immortals, we have Jose Mourinho, superstar manager; Luis Suarez, the ultimate striker and his one-time teammate at Liverpool; the legendary Steven Gerrard and Brazilian superstar Kaka.

programme.title: Top 20 - Best Looking Champions League's Players - EP58
programme.desc: The Top 20 is an exclusive ranking of the news or the champions who are causing a buzz on planet sport! Who are the best looking kids of the Champions League? TRACE Sports gives you a house rating of these footballing Apollos.

programme.title: The Truth About - Bayern Munich - EP81
programme.desc: In this episode, find out the whole truth about Bayern Munich. The legendary players (Beckenbauer, Müller, Lahm etc), the many trophies, the account balances... this German club dominates the Bundesliga. Bayern are one of the European greats!

programme.title: Fight Stars - Manny Pacquiao - EP3
programme.desc: In this episode of Fight Stars, meet the Philippine boxer Manny Pacquiao, the legend Muhammad Ali, the fighter Helen Maroulis and the American actress who has fallen for a wrestler.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Humility - EP112
programme.desc: In this episode, we will learn the importance of humility. We will understand how to have good sportsmanship and respect the efforts of your opponent. We will learn that with humility we can put aside arrogance and anger. We will also discover that there is no problem in asking for help from others because in doing so, that is also an act of humility.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Responsibility - EP113
programme.desc: In this episode, we will learn that we must fulfil our responsibilities, and in that way, we will be able to be in harmony with other people. We will discover how to be attentive to help both at school and at home. And in this way, we can learn more each day and be up to date with each task.

programme.title: Mellodees - Humpty Dumpty - EP15
programme.desc: Dee and Lil Mello work their magic to put their guitar back together again.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep8 - EP108
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.title: Giselle and the Green Team - The Case of the Cynicale Cycler - EP112
programme.desc: Gisele and the Green Team stop Nick Slick from dumping electronics into the environment.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Queenie for a Day - EP109
programme.desc: Queenie is too big to go through the fancy carwash she saw on TV. The Shaq Paw has to find a way to cheer her up.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - If the Fossil Fits / A Golden Opportunity - EP103
programme.desc: When Kent discovers a dinosaur fossil, the SECRET LAB KIDS learn about fossils, DNA and even go back to prehistoric times to determine if Kent has discovered a completely new dinosaur! / When Angie loses her mother’s favorite – and valuable – gold bracelet at the beach, our heroes build a homemade metal detector to find it.

programme.title: Mellodees - Itsy Bitsy Spider - EP3
programme.desc: With a rainstorm approaching, Dee has playtime in his room and makes a new little friend.

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep5 - EP105
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Saving Klaus - EP108
programme.desc: Klaus is on loan to a local car museum, but the Shaq Paq gets the wrong idea and suits up for a clandestine rescue operation.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep8 - EP108
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.desc: When Kent feels ignored by the other SLKids, he unexpectedly becomes friends with the ants of Ant-Urbia, who eat a special substance from the Kafloogalator that allows them to communicate with Kent and become a super-organism super-friend. / Kent flies Edison’s Awesomobile to France to meet Sheila, but he is mistaken for an alien in a UFO, and the Team Kids must rescue him from an Area 51-type base.

programme.title: Mellodees - Hickory Dickory Dock - EP12
programme.desc: Mini Dee explores the inner workings of a clock in this magical adventure.

programme.title: Misha, the Purple Cat
programme.desc: Misha is a very lively, alert cat. She is very interested in investigating everything going on around her, which means she has some very entertaining adventures with her friends. Many things can happen in Misha’s world; especially exciting adventures, mysterious investigations, hilarious competitions... all with a feeling of close friendship.

programme.title: Music Box
programme.desc: Get ready to dance and sing-along to music-filled episodes

programme.title: LOL Block
programme.desc: A crazy collection of hilarious comedy series featuring shows like, Jelly Jam, Crazy Candies, Karim & Noor, and Talking Tom.

programme.title: Baby Riki
programme.desc: The show covers all aspects of a child’s life from physical well-being to cognitive and soft skills. The musical stories are based around age-appropriate experiences with educational concepts introduced in familiar surroundings and context for infants.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends Minis
programme.desc: Get ready to watch Talking Tom and Friends at their cutest! Mini in size, but massive in fun, the Minis check out the day-to-day world of the friends we all know and love where they do the most ordinary things in the most extraordinary ways.

programme.title: Leo the Wildlife Ranger
programme.desc: Leo the Wildlife Ranger introduces the secrets and wonders of nature and wildlife around us and kickstarts a curiosity and passion for nature in kids. With engaging missions and adventures, kids have fun while learning positive lessons!

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: The show features Paula and her friends, Tim, Billy, Chalky, Calc, and the Numbers as they go on exciting adventures in colorful and exotic places. From the Amazon jungles to the deepest oceans, and to the hottest deserts, Paula and friends solve problems, have fun and make more friends along the way!

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Bino & Fino
programme.desc: Bino & Fino is about a brother and sister named Bino and Fino who live with their grandparents 'Mama' and 'Papa' in a modern day city in Africa. Bino and Fino have many adventures where, with the help of their friend Zeena the Magic Butterfly, they discover and learn things about the world.

programme.title: Horaci the Inuit
programme.desc: Packed with adventure, fun and excitement, HORACI THE INUIT will transport you to the Lands of the North where, together with his best friend Sedna, he will have to solve all kinds of mysteries! Horaci the Inuit takes place in a remote village and talks about universal values such as caring for nature, being intuitive and open-minded and, above all, having a loving respect for family and friends!

programme.title: Nutri Ventures
programme.desc: Protecting Healthy Foods At All Costs!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they're learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: Hogie the Globehopper
programme.desc: Hogie the Globehopper is a fun tv show that will inspire a curiosity and fascination about the world and its people. Hogie and his friends Lorna, Bernie and Floaty travel the world, making lots of friends along the way.

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - At The North Pole
programme.desc: Bernard gets bored trekking across the frozen Arctic wastes. Some abandoned equipment becomes a source of great entertainment, but not for long.

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - The Package
programme.desc: Zack tries to steal a parcel which Bernard is carrying. At first he succeeds, but Bernard doesn't give up that easily.

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - Sleepwalker
programme.desc: Even when he's asleep, Bernard is capable of anything – as he finds out when he wakes up in the morning.

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - The Pizza
programme.desc: Bernard

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - The Unicycle
programme.desc: To the amazement of Zack, Bernard discovers he has some performing skills which he never knew he had.

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - The Motorboat
programme.desc: Although Bernard has been shipwrecked, his real problems begin when he finds an abandoned motorboat which could get him back to shore.

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - The Prisoner
programme.desc: Bernard makes a daring escape from prison, but once he's out, he realises that perhaps life inside wasn't so bad after all.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Brain Candy TV
programme.desc: Early learning for a brighter future! Your children will love to learn their ABCs, numbers, colors and even some math and science with the help of our action-packed vehicles including monster trucks, dump trucks, trains and more, plus our cute dog Lizzy.

programme.title: Nutri Ventures
programme.desc: Protecting Healthy Foods At All Costs!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they're learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock’ Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it’s not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.
